message:
✨ Add framework-level GA4 card interaction tracking (#2052)

Instrument shared card UI components so ALL cards get consistent
analytics tracking automatically — no per-card changes needed.

New events fired from shared components:
- ksc_card_sort_changed — from CardControls sort dropdown
- ksc_card_sort_direction_changed — from CardControls direction toggle
- ksc_card_limit_changed — from CardControls limit dropdown
- ksc_card_search_used — from CardSearchInput (on blur)
- ksc_card_cluster_filter_changed — from CardClusterFilter (toggle/clear)

All events include page_path for dashboard-level attribution.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
